title: Lenskit Cross-Repo Links
description: List of heuristic linkages detected between different repository bundles during a federated query. Each link records only co-occurrence of results in the same query — it does NOT assert identity, dependency, or semantic equality between repositories.

source_repo.description: Repository ID where the reference originates.

link_type.description: The type of relationship detected. 'co_occurrence' means both repos returned results for the same query; it proves only shared query-result presence, not identity, dependency, or semantic similarity.

confidence.description: Confidence level of the linkage. Must be 'inferred' for all heuristic links.

evidence_refs.description: List of chunk IDs from the final returned results that evidence the link. All refs are present in the results payload.
